projectModeTooltip: In this mode, new chats are created in the current project. Project instructions apply only to chat model requests; image generation, image editing, and other non-chat capabilities do not use them.

externalLink.title: Open external link?
externalLink.description: You are about to leave this site. Confirm the link before continuing.

artifact.title: Artifact Preview
artifact.description: Render this code block inside an isolated sandbox.
artifact.empty: This code block is empty and cannot be previewed yet.
artifact.security: The preview runs in an isolated sandbox with external network, forms, popups, parent page access, and storage access restricted.

artifacts.empty: This artifact is empty and cannot be previewed yet.

messages.streamInterrupted: The generation connection was interrupted. Retry this message.
messages.editCreatesBranch: Saving creates a new branch in this conversation.
messages.memorySavedDescription: This preference will apply to future conversations.
messages.memorySaveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again later.
messages.authTokenMissing: Unable to get authentication token. Please sign in again.

attachments.maxUploadFiles: Each message can include up to {count} files.
attachments.policyRejected: This file is not supported by the current chat capabilities.
attachments.autoTruncatedDescription: Kept the first {max} attachments and ignored {count} files over the limit.
attachments.screenshotUnsupported: This browser does not support screenshots

policy.mimeNotAllowed: This file type is not included in the admin MIME allowlist.
policy.fullContextLimitExceeded: Vector retrieval is disabled. Only small files that fit full-context injection can be uploaded, and this file exceeds the {limit} KB limit.
policy.sizeLimitExceeded: This file exceeds the {limit} KB limit.

submit.attachmentsTruncatedDescription: Each message can send up to {count} files. Extra attachments were ignored.
submit.createConversationFailed: Failed to create a new conversation
submit.mediaInputUnsupported: The selected model cannot process this input

mediaInputBlocked.image_edit_input_required: This model edits images. Upload an image to edit first.
mediaInputBlocked.image_edit_unsupported: This model does not support image editing. Remove the image or select an editing-capable model.
mediaInputBlocked.image_generation_rejects_attachments: Image generation accepts text prompts only. Remove attachments or select a model that handles them.
mediaInputBlocked.image_task_rejects_non_image_attachments: Image tasks only support image attachments. Remove non-image files.
mediaInputBlocked.model_task_unsupported: This model cannot process the current input. Select another model and try again.

submit.continueGenerationPrompt: Continue from the previous interrupted reply without repeating content that was already generated.
submit.continueReplyUnavailable: This reply cannot be continued right now.
submit.retryReplyMissingUser: The corresponding user message was not found.

data.signInRequired: Sign in before loading conversation messages.

models.loadFailed: Failed to load models. Please try again later.

billing.cacheWritePricingNote: Claude cache read uses configured pricing; cache write 5m uses 1.25x, 1h uses 2x, and Fast Mode applies another 6x on top.
billing.claudeCacheWriteMixedNote: Claude cache write uses configured pricing at {multiplier}.
billing.claudeCacheWriteNote: Claude {timeout} cache write uses configured pricing at {multiplier}.
billing.claudeFastModeNote: Claude Fast Mode bills input, output, and cache usage at {multiplier}.

composer.nativeToolMayNotApplyHelp: This tool is not adapted for the current request protocol. If enabled, it is still written to JSON and left for the upstream provider to handle.
composer.ignoredHelp: Not enabled means this option is not present in the JSON on the left and will not be sent. Ignored means it is present in JSON but filtered by the backend passthrough policy.
composer.streamResponseParseFailed: The upstream returned HTTP {statusCode}, but the stream format is incompatible with the selected protocol.
composer.dialogDescription: {model} request parameters. Saved values are sent with model requests.
composer.ragAllDisabled: All attachments have RAG disabled and will be injected as full context. This may use more tokens.
composer.ragDisabledTitle: This file has RAG disabled and will be injected as full context. It may use more tokens.
composer.mcpToolLimitDescription: A message can use up to {limit} MCP tools. Clear some tools before selecting more.
composer.htmlVisualPromptEnabled: Visual layout prompt is enabled. This turn will inject safe inline HTML formatting rules when useful.
composer.htmlVisualPromptDisabled: Enable the visual layout prompt to guide safe inline HTML for complex structures.
composer.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported by this browser

mediaMode.imageGenerationDescription: Creates a new image from the text prompt. Upload an image to switch to image editing.
mediaMode.imageEditDescription: Edits the uploaded image using the text prompt.
mediaMode.invalidFileIntro: This file cannot be used for an image task.

blockedDescriptions.image_edit_input_required: Upload an image to edit first.
blockedDescriptions.image_edit_unsupported: The selected model does not support image editing. Remove the image or switch models.
blockedDescriptions.image_generation_rejects_attachments: Image generation only accepts text prompts. Remove attachments.
blockedDescriptions.image_task_rejects_non_image_attachments: Image tasks only support image attachments. Remove non-image files.
blockedDescriptions.model_task_unsupported: The selected model cannot process this input. Switch models and try again.

modelPicker.freeModelDescription: No usage balance will be deducted
modelPicker.cacheWritePricingNote: Claude cache read uses configured pricing; cache write 5m uses 1.25x, 1h uses 2x, and Fast Mode applies another 6x on top.
modelPicker.claudeCacheWriteMixedNote: Claude cache write uses configured pricing at {multiplier}.
modelPicker.claudeCacheWriteNote: Claude {timeout} cache write uses configured pricing at {multiplier}.
modelPicker.claudeFastModeNote: Claude Fast Mode bills input, output, and cache usage at {multiplier}.

rag.summary: {count, plural, one {# relevant chunk} other {# relevant chunks}} found
rag.completed: Retrieval complete; searched {fileCount, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} and matched {chunkCount, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}}.
rag.incompleteWithFullText: Retrieval did not complete; switched to full text.
rag.incompleteNoFullText: Retrieval did not complete and no full text was available.
rag.emptyWithFullText: No relevant chunks were found; switched to full text.
rag.emptyNoFullText: No relevant chunks were found and no full text was available.
rag.lowScoreWithFullText: Retrieval results were below the similarity threshold; switched to full text.
rag.lowScoreNoFullText: Retrieval results were below the similarity threshold and no full text was available.
rag.skippedFallback: Some files were skipped because they exceeded the context budget or had no extracted text.

fileContext.includedSummary: Included {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}
fileContext.includedDetail: included {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}
fileContext.skipped: skipped {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}

trace.summaryActive: {count, plural, one {# tool call in progress} other {# tool calls in progress}}
trace.summaryCount: {count, plural, one {# tool call completed} other {# tool calls completed}}
trace.summaryFailed: {count, plural, one {# tool call} other {# tool calls}}, {failed, plural, one {# failed} other {# failed}}

think.subtitleActive: Parsing the request and organizing key context

modes.stateful: This turn used previous response continuation
modes.fullRetry: Continuation failed; retried with full context

promptTrace.statefulSummary: Continued with {messages, plural, one {# message} other {# messages}}

compaction.detail: Conversation context was compacted into a rolling summary.

optionDescriptions.background: Controls the generated image background. Transparent output requires model and format support.
optionDescriptions.budget_tokens: Limits the token budget available for thinking or reasoning.
optionDescriptions.cache_timeout: Controls how long prompt cache entries can be reused.
optionDescriptions.candidate_count: Requests the number of candidate responses returned by the upstream model.
optionDescriptions.effort: Controls the amount of reasoning or thinking effort.
optionDescriptions.enable_cache: Controls whether upstream or proxy caching is enabled.
optionDescriptions.enable_thinking: Controls whether the model emits thinking or reasoning content.
optionDescriptions.frequency_penalty: Reduces the model's tendency to repeat frequent words or phrases.
optionDescriptions.generationConfig__frequencyPenalty: Gemini frequency penalty for reducing repetition.
optionDescriptions.generationConfig__logprobs: Number of Gemini logprobs to return.
optionDescriptions.generationConfig__presencePenalty: Gemini presence penalty for encouraging new topics.
optionDescriptions.generationConfig__responseLogprobs: Controls whether Gemini returns token probabilities.
optionDescriptions.generationConfig__responseModalities: Requested Gemini output modalities, such as TEXT or IMAGE.
optionDescriptions.generationConfig__thinkingConfig__includ: Controls whether Gemini thinking content is included.
optionDescriptions.input_fidelity: Controls how strongly image edits preserve input image details.
optionDescriptions.logprobs: Number of token probability entries to return.
optionDescriptions.max_completion_tokens: Limits the maximum tokens generated for this response.
optionDescriptions.max_output_tokens: Limits the maximum output tokens for this response.
optionDescriptions.max_tokens: Limits the maximum tokens generated for this response.
optionDescriptions.n: Number of images to generate for this request.
optionDescriptions.output_compression: Compression level for JPEG or WebP output, usually 0-100.
optionDescriptions.output_format: Image output file format, such as png, jpeg, or webp.
optionDescriptions.output_config__effort: Controls reasoning effort during output generation.
optionDescriptions.partial_images: Number of intermediate preview images returned during streaming, usually 0-3.
optionDescriptions.presence_penalty: Encourages the model to introduce new topics.
optionDescriptions.quality: Controls generated image quality or render tier.
optionDescriptions.response_format: Controls whether image responses return URLs or base64 JSON.
optionDescriptions.response_format__type: Controls text response format, such as text or JSON.
optionDescriptions.response_logprobs: Controls whether response token probabilities are returned.
optionDescriptions.seed: Sets a sampling seed to make experiments easier to reproduce.
optionDescriptions.service_tier: Selects the upstream service tier, such as default, priority, or flex.
optionDescriptions.speed: Controls speed mode for models that support it.
optionDescriptions.temperature: Controls sampling randomness. Higher values are more varied.
optionDescriptions.thinking__display: Controls whether thinking content is shown or summarized.
optionDescriptions.thinking__includeThoughts: Controls whether thinking content is included.
optionDescriptions.thinking__include_thoughts: Controls whether thinking content is included.
optionDescriptions.thinking__type: Controls thinking enablement or adaptive mode.
optionDescriptions.thinkingConfig__includeThoughts: Controls whether thinking content is included.
optionDescriptions.tool_choice: Controls whether and how the model chooses tools.
optionDescriptions.top_k: Limits how many candidate tokens participate in sampling.
optionDescriptions.top_p: Controls the nucleus sampling probability mass.
optionDescriptions.verbosity: Controls output detail for models that support it.
optionDescriptions.web_search: Controls whether native web search is enabled.

nativeToolDescriptions.openai__web_search: Use OpenAI hosted web search for realtime information.
nativeToolDescriptions.openai__web_search_preview: Use OpenAI hosted web search preview for realtime information.
nativeToolDescriptions.openai__shell: Use OpenAI hosted shell execution in an automatic container.
nativeToolDescriptions.openai__code_interpreter: Use OpenAI hosted code interpreter for code and file tasks.
nativeToolDescriptions.google__google_search: Use Google hosted search grounding for realtime information.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__web_search_20250305: Use Anthropic hosted web search for realtime information.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__web_search_20260209: Use Anthropic hosted web search for realtime information.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__web_fetch_20250910: Use Anthropic hosted web fetch to read specific web pages.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__web_fetch_20260209: Use Anthropic hosted web fetch to read specific web pages.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__advisor_20260301: Use Anthropic hosted advisor tool for guidance.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__tool_search_tool_regex_202511: Use Anthropic hosted regex tool search.
nativeToolDescriptions.anthropic__tool_search_tool_bm25_2025111: Use Anthropic hosted BM25 tool search.
nativeToolDescriptions.xai__web_search: Use xAI hosted web search for realtime information.
nativeToolDescriptions.xai__x_search: Use xAI hosted X search for social platform information.
